LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF'S APPLICATION FOR A TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER. MATTER ARGUED. OUT OF THE PRESENCE OF THE COURT, COUNSEL CONFER. COUNSEL ADVISES THE COURT THEY HAVE REACHED A STIPULATION REGARDING PLAINTIFF'S APPLICATION FOR A TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER. STIPULATION READ IN OPEN COURT. COUNSEL TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER FOR THE COURT'S SIGNATURE. THE HEARING ON PLAINTIFF'S APPLICATION FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION WILL BE ON JUNE 10, 2014 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 302. FURTHER BRIEFING WILL BE DUE BY END OF BUSINESS ON JUNE 5, 2014. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: JOYCE FINLEY #8620

Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment Thereon
Off Calendar Jan-07-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT 24 HOUR FITNESS USA, INC'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment Thereon is granted. No opposition filed. The prevailing party is to provide a formal form of order and a separate proposed judgment.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489. (302/EG)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-09-2014 Continued To Dec-10-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Plaintiff Champion Fitness, Llc'S Application For Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Jun-10-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Plaintiff Champion Fitness, Llc'S Application For Preliminary Injunction is off calendar pursuant to the parties' stipulation. Order and stipulation signed on June 9, 2014. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

Plaintiff'S Application For A Temporary Restraining Order
Off Calendar May-29-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Goines, Esq. 650.328.8500, and Adam Seigler, Esq., 310.586.6536, for plaintiff Champion Fitness, LLC.
Hyongsoon Kim, Esq., and Susan Leader, Esq., 310.229.1000, for defendant 24 Hour Fitness USA, Inc.

RULING: Matter argued. Out of the presence of the Court, counsel confer. Counsel advises the Court they have reached a stipulation regarding plaintiff's application for a temporary restraining order. Stipulation read in open court. Counsel to prepare a form of order for the Court's signature. The hearing on plaintiff's application for preliminary injunction will be on June 10, 2014 at 9:30 am in Department 302. Further briefing will be due by end of business on June 5, 2014. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Joyce Finley #8620.
